column1: Hey Trenton, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details

Hey spiffy you around for a quick call? Want to ask some questions about SB. I have a group ready to book
March 15th-22nd and were looking at occidental caribe punta
Hey yea we can hop on in 20 if that works
How many ppl in your group?
Sweet give me a ring when you're around.
Not completely sure but going to be a big group. Just wanted to run our other price by you with a couple questions because I've heard good things about your company
Oh aight bet, you were initially working with another company?
I'll def hook it up for you
Yeah I'm in talks with them currently
Yea fam let us take care of you lol
I'll hyu in 20, will be mobile if that's cool
yo! workin on this now brotha

so at the moment I'm working on a package with flights included, but I just emailed you what it looks lik without flights included so you can see details about the resort, whats included, etc

Like experience is way better and rooms are way way nicer. so gonna see what I can do
